[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0100100000 2
2 0000100001 2
3 0000111100 4
4 0010110000 3
5 0101000110 4
6 1001011111 7
7 0111011110 7

12 21 0000100000 1
23 32 0000000000 a match 0

45 54 0001011110 5
56 65 0001000100 2
67 76 0000000100 1
70 07 0000100101 3

13 31 0000000000 a match 0
24 42 1000000000 1
35 53 0101000110 4 match 5
46 64 0001000100 2
57 75 0100010100 3
60 06 0000000100 1
71 17 0000110000 2
